message:
refactor(mcp): consolidate framework re-exports into shared mcp_framework module

Each MCP-related module (mcp.rs, mcp_bridge.rs, mcp_client.rs,
mcp_middleware.rs, mcp_proxy.rs, mcp_resources.rs) previously defined
its own private inner module re-exporting fastmcp types with aliased
names. This was duplicated boilerplate — every file had a nearly
identical `mod mcp_*_framework { pub use fastmcp::{...}; }` block.

Extracted all shared re-exports into a single crate-level
`mcp_framework` module gated on `#[cfg(any(feature = "mcp",
feature = "mcp-client"))]`. Each consumer now imports from
`crate::mcp_framework::` instead of defining its own local re-export.

Similarly, web.rs had a `mod web_framework` block re-exporting fastapi
types; this is now `crate::web_framework` for the same reason.

Also registers `pub mod swarm_scheduler` in lib.rs (was previously a
file but not wired into the crate's public module tree).

Net effect: ~60 lines of duplicated re-export boilerplate removed,
single source of truth for framework type aliases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
